title: Senior Teacher - Mahendra's Institute - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Mahendra's Institute - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahendra's Institute:
Mahendra's Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute!
